raw_response:
```json
{
  "communicative_function": "The statement is exhorting a sense of urgency and self-value, encouraging an entity to respect itself before it is too late.",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "The soul currently disrespects itself.",
    "There is limited time remaining to change this behavior.",
    "Self-respect is important and should be prioritized before time runs out."
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "The statement is internally coherent; it presents a clear argument that self-respect should not be delayed and is presented as a matter of urgency.",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The statement would be useful if the audience is currently engaged in self-sabotage or self-disrespect and is capable of changing their behavior within a limited time frame.",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The statement could be misleading if the concept of self-respect is not contextually relevant or if the urgency of time does not apply. It could also mislead if there is no actual 'end' to the time available for self-reflection and change."
}
```

parsed_json.communicative_function: The statement is exhorting a sense of urgency and self-value, encouraging an entity to respect itself before it is too late.
implicit_claims: There is limited time remaining to change this behavior.
Self-respect is important and should be prioritized before time runs out.
parsed_json.coherence_assessment: The statement is internally coherent; it presents a clear argument that self-respect should not be delayed and is presented as a matter of urgency.
parsed_json.conditions_for_usefulness: The statement would be useful if the audience is currently engaged in self-sabotage or self-disrespect and is capable of changing their behavior within a limited time frame.
parsed_json.conditions_for_misleading: The statement could be misleading if the concept of self-respect is not contextually relevant or if the urgency of time does not apply. It could also mislead if there is no actual 'end' to the time available for self-reflection and change.
